calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-30-2019 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Settlement Of Estate Without An Accounting, For Allowance Of Attorney Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs By Placement Of A Lien On The Real Property And For Final Distribution Of The Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Apr-16-2019 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Settlement Of Estate Without An Accounting, For Allowance Of Attorney Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs By Placement Of A Lien On The Real Property And For Final Distribution Of The Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Mar-12-2019 Continued To Apr-16-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sanford Margolin for Petitioner.

Mr. Margolin stated that he hasn't seen anything like this in his forty years of practice, that at the time when he filed his petition he was unaware of the first petition, that they now have an Administrator and an Executor, and that in the stipulation and the ex parte petition they are asking for the Court to allow the Executor to step down and appoint the Administrator with will annexed. Mr. Margolin also stated that Ms. Waller nominated Mr. Poschman, that she would like Mr. Poschman to be appointed, that she joined in the ex parte petition and that he would like a clear path. The Court informed Mr. Margolin that it can not tell him how to proceed. The Petition to Approve Settlement of Estate Without an Accounting, etc. is continued to April 16, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Approve Settlement Of Estate Without An Accounting, For Allowance Of Attorney Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs By Placement Of A Lien On The Real Property And For Final Distribution Of The Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Continued To Mar-12-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Approve Settlement Of Estate Without An Accounting, For Allowance Of Attorney Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs By Placement Of A Lien On The Real Property And For Final Distribution Of The Decedents Estate
Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Continued To Feb-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sanford Margolin appeared by telephone for Gene Poschman.

Mr. Margolin stated that he understands the recommendation of the Probate Examiner to consolidate the cases, asked if the Court would issue an order appointing administrator with will annexed, and stated that he believes creditor's claims were filed in 1982 and no one filed a law suit. The Court informed Counsel that he will need to make the appropriate requests to get orders signed. The Petition to Approve Settlement of Estate Without an Accounting, etc. is continued to February 26, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Approve Settlement Of Estate Without An Accounting, For Allowance Of Attorney Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs By Placement Of A Lien On The Real Property And For Final Distribution Of The Decedents Estate
